title: Rooms
subtitle: The map of your house
empty: You don't have any rooms yet. Create one to get started — then each device can be assigned to the right room.
name: Name
confirmDelete: Delete the room "{{name}}"? Its devices will stay but won't have a room anymore.
devicesHint: Drop each device into the right room. Voice commands can then target rooms (e.g. "hey home, turn on the bedroom air conditioner").
devicesEmpty: No devices configured yet. Connect cameras, TV, or others from the Settings page and they'll appear here.
